title: High-Fashion Advertisement Photo
sourceTitle: Oppo Hasselblad High Fashion Tech Ad Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-fashion 3:4 technology advertisement photo for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, centered on adult model in deep teal oversized hoodie with black-white stripe accents holding the phone as the hero product. Subject: A stunning high-fashion advertisement photo of a young woman wearing a deep teal oversized hoodie with black and white geometric stripe accents, holding an OPPO Find X9 supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. adult model in deep teal oversized hoodie with black-white stripe accents holds the OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone up to cover the left eye, with the Moonlight Silver phone back facing the camera and the Hasselblad quad-camera system clearly visible. Scene: A stunning high-fashion advertisement photo of a young woman wearing a deep teal oversized hoodie with black and white geometric stripe accents, holding an OPPO Find X9 provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Deep midnight teal solid studio background with a clean white OPPO logo badge at top center and bold product headline at the bottom. Composition: Fixed portrait advertisement crop: model centered, phone covers the left eye, phone back faces camera, OPPO badge sits top center, product headline sits bottom, and the face/phone hierarchy remains sharp and editorial. Signature Elements: Phone covering one eye, Moonlight Silver glass back, Hasselblad quad-camera system, OPPO badge, deep teal background, luxury fashion styling, and premium technology campaign finish. Style: Luxury tech advertisement aesthetic, high-fashion editorial campaign photography, ultra-sharp 4K commercial quality, professional color grading, premium retouching, and dramatic studio polish. Color Palette: Fixed deep midnight teal, Moonlight Silver glass, clean white OPPO text, black-and-white geometric accents, and cool premium technology highlights. Lighting: Dramatic cinematic studio lighting with clean face highlights, reflective phone-glass sheen, controlled shadows, crisp camera-module detail, and polished commercial contrast. Typography: OPPO appears as the top logo badge; Find X9 Ultra - See Further. Shoot Sharper. appears as bold readable bottom text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-fashion 3:4 technology advertisement photo for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, centered on adult model in cobalt oversized sweatshirt with silver sleeve graphics holding the phone as the hero product. Subject: A stunning high-fashion advertisement photo of a young woman wearing a deep teal oversized hoodie with black and white geometric stripe accents, holding an OPPO Find X9 supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. adult model in cobalt oversized sweatshirt with silver sleeve graphics holds the OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone up to cover the left eye, with the Moonlight Silver phone back facing the camera and the Hasselblad quad-camera system clearly visible. Scene: A stunning high-fashion advertisement photo of a young woman wearing a deep teal oversized hoodie with black and white geometric stripe accents, holding an OPPO Find X9 provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Deep midnight teal solid studio background with a clean white OPPO logo badge at top center and bold product headline at the bottom. Composition: Fixed portrait advertisement crop: model centered, phone covers the left eye, phone back faces camera, OPPO badge sits top center, product headline sits bottom, and the face/phone hierarchy remains sharp and editorial. Signature Elements: Phone covering one eye, Moonlight Silver glass back, Hasselblad quad-camera system, OPPO badge, deep teal background, luxury fashion styling, and premium technology campaign finish. Style: Luxury tech advertisement aesthetic, high-fashion editorial campaign photography, ultra-sharp 4K commercial quality, professional color grading, premium retouching, and dramatic studio polish. Color Palette: Fixed deep midnight teal, Moonlight Silver glass, clean white OPPO text, black-and-white geometric accents, and cool premium technology highlights. Lighting: Dramatic cinematic studio lighting with clean face highlights, reflective phone-glass sheen, controlled shadows, crisp camera-module detail, and polished commercial contrast. Typography: OPPO appears as the top logo badge; Find X9 Ultra - See Further. Shoot Sharper. appears as bold readable bottom text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
